title: Umami Parm Regg Indian Stir-fry
description: A crisp umami Indian dish featuring Parmigiano-Reggiano, cooked with sous-vide and kosher-friendly.
instructions: Season the lamb with a pinch of salt and pepper. Cook it in the sous-vide pouch until done, about 50 minutes.
In a skillet, heat some oil over medium heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent, around 8-10 minutes.
Add smashed garlic cloves to the onions, stirring occasionally for an additional minute or so until fragrant.
Mix in salted paneer cheese. Gently stir until it melts into the onion mixture, about 2 minutes.
Once the lamb is cooked and cooled enough, chop it into bite-sized pieces. Add it to the skillet with your onion-cheese mixture.
Season with red chili flakes and fresh coriander. Stir thoroughly, ensuring everything is well combined.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Optionally top with grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese.
